codeReview.summary: The worker fixed the TypeScript type compatibility issues in schema.test.ts by modifying the ApiResponseSchema function signature in schema.ts. The change was from `<T extends Schema.Schema<unknown>>` to `<T>`, which allows Effect Schema types like UserSchema and ApiErrorSchema to be properly passed without type errors. The fix is minimal and targeted.

summary: The feature fix is complete and verified. The TypeScript type errors in schema.test.ts (lines 321, 346, 363) have been resolved by changing the generic constraint in ApiResponseSchema from `<T extends Schema.Schema<unknown>>` to `<T>` in resources/js/lib/schema.ts. All 320 tests pass and no TypeScript errors remain in schema.test.ts.
